title: Leptorkis odontostoma
taxonomy: Leptorkis odontostoma is a species of flowering plant in the family Zingiberaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and is commonly known as the 'Wild Ginger'. This species belongs to the genus Leptorkis, which is closely related to the genus Kaempferia. Leptorkis odontostoma is further classified into several subspecies based on its geographic distribution and morphological characteristics. The exact classification of Leptorkis odontostoma may vary depending on the source and the current taxonomic understanding.
